data.title: TPS publishes 2026 calendar of key corporate events
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

TPS S.p.A. ( (IT:TPS) ) has issued an update.

TPS S.p.A., the operating holding of Gruppo TPS active in technical and engineering services across aeronautical and other transport-related sectors, has published its calendar of key corporate events for the 2026 financial year. The Board of Directors will meet on 30 March 2026 to approve the consolidated and draft statutory financial statements for the year ended 31 December 2025, followed by the ordinary shareholders’ meeting on 29 April 2026 to approve the statutory financial statements and present the consolidated accounts, and a further board meeting on 28 September 2026 to approve the consolidated half-year financial report as at 30 June 2026, signaling a clear timetable for financial disclosures and governance milestones to stakeholders, with the company committing to promptly communicate any changes to these dates.

More about TPS S.p.A.

TPS S.p.A. is the operating holding company of Gruppo TPS, a provider of technical and engineering services primarily for the aeronautical industry, with a particular focus on helicopters. The group also serves the automotive, defense, railway, naval and cable transport sectors, offering technical publishing and training, engineering, design and cost engineering, avionics software development and systems integration, and digital content management. TPS, listed on Borsa Italiana as an “Elite” company since 2016, counts leading manufacturers of aircraft, components and transport systems among its clients.

Average Trading Volume: 10,037

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: €65.34M

For a thorough assessment of TPS stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Baltic Classifieds Group Plc ( (GB:BCG) ) has provided an update.

Baltic Classifieds Group Plc has repurchased 239,426 of its ordinary shares for cancellation on 28 January 2026 at an average price of 205.5814p per share, executed through Merrill Lynch International within its ongoing share buyback programme. Following this transaction, the company’s share capital stands at 473,069,821 ordinary shares in issue with no shares held in treasury, a reduction that marginally enhances earnings per share and adjusts the total voting rights used by investors for regulatory disclosure thresholds under the FCA’s transparency rules.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:BCG) stock is a Buy with a £225.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Baltic Classifieds Group Plc stock, see the GB:BCG Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Sendero Resources Wins Key Permit Renewals for Peñas Negras Copper-Gold Project in Argentina
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Sendero Resources Corp. ( (TSE:SEND) ) has provided an update.

Sendero Resources Corp. has secured updated permits for its flagship Peñas Negras property in La Rioja Province, Argentina, enabling full exploration and advancement toward development across multiple copper-gold targets within the prolific Vicuña Copper-Gold Belt. The renewed approvals, underlining strong backing from provincial authorities, provide regulatory clarity that could accelerate Sendero’s project pipeline in a strategically important mining district, reinforcing the company’s positioning as an emerging player in a region hosting several large-scale copper-gold operations.

More about Sendero Resources Corp.

Sendero Resources Corp. is a Vancouver-based mineral exploration company focused on copper-gold exploration at its 100%-owned Peñas Negras Project in Argentina’s Vicuña Belt. The project hosts multiple porphyry and high-sulfidation epithermal targets and lies near major regional operations and projects, including Lundin Mining’s Caserones mine, NGEx Minerals’ Lunahuasi project and BHP-Lundin Mining’s Filo del Sol, with additional options over nearby mining concessions expanding its total land position to 211.77 km².

Average Trading Volume: 43,667

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Inspiration Energy Rehires Plutus for Investor Marketing Ahead of Rottenstone Drilling
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Rock Edge Resources Ltd. ( (TSE:ISP) ) has issued an update.

Inspiration Energy Corp. has re-engaged Germany-based Plutus Invest & Consulting GmbH to provide marketing and investor awareness services for a one-year term at a cost of up to €250,000, with no securities being issued as compensation and no equity position held by Plutus or its related parties. Management frames the renewed mandate as timely amid record commodity prices and strong investor appetite for junior mining stocks, highlighting a relatively tight share structure of just over 40 million shares and outlining plans for a spring drill program at its Rottenstone North property, which could help advance its exploration portfolio and attract further market attention to its gold-copper VMS assets.

More about Rock Edge Resources Ltd.

Inspiration Energy Corp. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on acquiring and developing highly prospective gold and base metal properties. Its flagship Rottenstone North and Rottenstone West projects make it one of the largest landholders in a prominent emerging gold-copper VMS discovery corridor in Canada, positioning the firm to benefit from heightened interest in junior mining opportunities.

data.title: Capitol Federal Financial Reports Strong Quarterly Commercial Banking Growth
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Capitol Federal Financial ( (CFFN) ) is now available.

Capitol Federal Financial, Inc. reported preliminary results for the quarter ended December 31, 2025, showing total assets of $9.78 billion, stockholders’ equity of $1.04 billion and net income of $20.3 million, up from $18.8 million in the prior quarter, with earnings per share of $0.16. The bank improved its net interest margin to 2.19%, enhanced efficiency and operating expense ratios, and continued returning capital through dividends and the repurchase of roughly 2.38 million shares, even as equity declined due to these capital actions. The quarter underscored the company’s ongoing pivot toward full-service commercial banking, with commercial loans growing $162.6 million to $2.28 billion and commercial deposits rising $19.5 million to $527.7 million, as management redeployed funds from correspondent loan repayments and leveraged new treasury management, digital banking tools and relationship-driven commercial banking to deepen customer relationships. The bank is also building out private banking and wealth management for high-net-worth clients, and planning additional digital and treasury-management capabilities in 2026, moves aimed at diversifying funding sources, increasing noninterest income and supporting long-term shareholder value while maintaining disciplined credit and capital management.

The most recent analyst rating on (CFFN) stock is a Buy with a $8.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Capitol Federal Financial stock, see the CFFN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CFFN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CFFN is a Outperform.

Capitol Federal Financial’s overall stock score is driven by solid financial performance and positive corporate events. The company’s strong cash flow and profitability metrics are complemented by strategic initiatives and shareholder-friendly actions. However, technical indicators suggest caution due to overbought conditions, and the high debt-to-equity ratio remains a risk factor.

To see Spark’s full report on CFFN stock, click here.

More about Capitol Federal Financial

Capitol Federal Financial, Inc., parent of Capitol Federal Savings Bank, operates as a savings and banking institution focused on expanding from its traditional consumer base into a full-service commercial bank. The company is investing in technology, treasury management, small business services, and private banking, trust and wealth management to diversify its loan portfolio, grow commercial and small business deposits, and broaden fee-based revenue across its Kansas-centered franchise and beyond its core markets.

Average Trading Volume: 918,310

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $893.8M

Learn more about CFFN stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
